rationale: The citing paper includes Zhu, Chen, and Dasgupta (2008) only in grouped background citations when summarizing prior work on product upgrades and replacement decisions. It does not assign a distinct role to that study's trade-in mechanism, findings, or methods in developing this paper's hypotheses or analyses. The core theory and tests are built around egocentric categorization, self-focus, and self-enhancement, with no specific reuse or direct extension of Zhu et al. beyond general positioning in the literature.
